title: OpIndia moves Delhi High Court against order to remove articles on Swati Chaturvedi
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday sought the response of journalist Swati Chaturvedi on an appeal filed by OpIndia challenging a trial court order directing it to remove two articles published against Chaturvedi [Aadyasi Media Vs Swati Chaturvedi].Justice Manoj Kumar Ohri issued notice to Chaturvedi and listed the matter for further hearing on August 20.Justice Manoj Kumar OhriOpIndia has challenged the interim order passed by District Judge Meenu Kaushik of the Patiala House Court. Judge Kaushik
